SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DIANNE PEEBLES. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATE TO HAVE MATTER HEARD BY JUDGE PRO TEM.
